name: Create personal npm repositories in Artifactory
name_cn: 在 Artifactory 中创建个人 npm 仓库

name: Complete first npm build
hint: cd modules/npm-basic/sample-project, configure npm to use your virtual repo, then run: jf npm install --build-name=<NICKNAME>-npm-sample --build-number=1
hint_cn: 进入 modules/npm-basic/sample-project，配置 npm 指向你的虚拟仓库，然后运行：jf npm install --build-name=<NICKNAME>-npm-sample --build-number=1
